phrases.intent_en: Ask about climbing to the top
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'on peut monter en haut de l'Arc ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess kohn puh mohn-TAY ahn OH duh LARK
phrases.cultural_note: There are 284 steps to the top (no elevator). The panoramic terrace offers one of the best views in Paris — you can see all 12 avenues radiating from the Étoile.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure est le ravivage de la flamme ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UHR eh luh rah-vee-VAHZH duh lah FLAHM
phrases.cultural_note: The Eternal Flame at the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier is rekindled every evening at 6:30 PM. The ceremony has taken place every day since 1923.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to cross safely to the Arc
phrases.text_local: Comment traverser pour aller à l'Arc en toute sécurité ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN trah-vehr-SAY poor ah-LAY ah LARK ahn toot say-koo-ree-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: Never try to cross the roundabout on foot — it's extremely dangerous. Use the underground pedestrian tunnel from the Champs-Élysées sidewalk.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what is written on the Arc
phrases.text_local: Qu'est-ce qui est inscrit sur l'Arc ?
phrases.pronunciation: kess kee eh ahn-SKREE soor LARK
phrases.cultural_note: The Arc bears the names of 558 French generals and major victories. The inner walls list the names of those who died in the French Revolution and Napoleonic Wars.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the view of the Champs-Élysées
phrases.text_local: On voit les Champs-Élysées d'en haut ?
phrases.pronunciation: ohn vwah lay shahnz-ay-lee-ZAY dahn OH
phrases.cultural_note: From the top, you can see the entire Champs-Élysées stretching to Place de la Concorde, and in the other direction, La Défense's modern skyline.
